top_signals.title: NFL's Commanders, Raiders Shift Ownership Stakes
top_signals.summary: Doug Ostrover, the billionaire co-founder of Blue Owl Capital is unloading his stake in the NFL’s Washington Commanders. Also, Tech billionaire Michael Dell and Hollywood superagent Ari Emanuel are among a group of investors purchasing a minority stake in the Las Vegas Raiders football team. Scarlet Fu reports on "Bloomberg Deals." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Mamdani fires back at Bezos over Queens teacher tax remark
top_signals.summary: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos called for eliminating federal income taxes on the bottom half of earners as Mamdani pushes a luxury second-home tax in New York City.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
